ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "experiment_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated keywords related to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "experiment_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "d1" REAL /* Value of the first parameter */,
  "d2" REAL /* Value of the second parameter */,
  "num_calculations" INTEGER /* Number of calculations performed for this data point */,
  "point_type" INTEGER /* Type of the data point (e.g., 1 for a specific type) */,
  "cids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of identifiers related to the data point */,
  "data_point_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data point */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "data_point_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (note: this should be handled securely) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the device and browser used to access the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added this collaborator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this collaborator was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "report_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
